name: Corked Bat
description: +2 Power to every played card, but -1 Contact. Slightly illegal.

name: Pine Tar Rag
description: The first card of every play gets x1.5 Contact.

name: Old Glove
description: Adds half the total Defense of played cards to base score.

name: Rally Cap
description: +3 base while you are behind the inning target.

name: Big Foam Finger
description: Team Chemistry triggers with only 2 same-team cards.

name: Rookie Bubblegum
description: Rookie cards get +1 to every stat. Smells like 1987.

name: Scorekeeper's Pencil
description: +1 quality for every combo you land in a play.
